overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain trail during a misty golden hour morning. The character is passed by a horse rider and continues along the path as the view opens up to reveal a fog-filled valley with dramatic backlighting from the low sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with cliff face

events.description: horse rider appears in distance behind ego and begins to approach
horse rider passes ego character on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow mountain trail beside a rocky cliff

notable_agents.action: riding a horse and passing the ego character on the trail

entered.detail: steep rocky mountainside rising immediately beside the trail
tall pine trees lining the left side of the trail
distant mountain summit visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the right, with pine trees on the left. A horse rider approaches from behind and passes by on the left, continuing down the mountain path.

events.description: trail opens up to reveal expansive foggy valley view on the left
sunlight becomes visible through the trees creating a warm backlit atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens to reveal the misty valley below

entered.detail: gradual rocky mountainside replacing the steep cliff face
deep valley filled with morning mist and fog visible through the trees
layered mountain ridges visible in the background across the valley

segments.scene_description: After the horse passes, the trail continues along the mountainside and opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of a fog-filled valley below. The morning sun begins to stream through the pine trees, creating a warm, atmospheric glow as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with panoramic valley view

events.description: sun becomes prominently visible through the trees creating strong lens flare and silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty forest as the sun breaks through the canopy, illuminating the fog below

entered.detail: massive boulders and rocky formations beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the ridge as the sun breaks through the trees, casting dramatic rays through the dense fog filling the valley. Large rock outcrops line the right side of the trail while the view opens to a panoramic vista of the misty wilderness below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow mountain trail that gradually opens into a panoramic, sun-drenched vista of a misty valley. It begins with the character walking beside a rocky cliff face and pine trees as a horse rider approaches from behind and passes by on the left. As the rider disappears down the path, the trail expands to reveal a breathtaking view of a fog-filled valley below, while the morning sun begins to stream through the trees to create a warm, atmospheric glow. The scene then shifts as the character continues along the ridge, with the sun breaking fully through the canopy to cast dramatic rays across the dense fog. Finally, the view opens completely to a wide wilderness panorama, framed by large rock outcrops lining the right side of the trail.
